title: Stabilization / Full Regression Pass
scope: No feature work. Regression, smoke testing, repo hygiene, and validation reporting after M60.4.1 PathWalk M60-native adaptation.

core_cli_class_split_regression.note: Each unittest class from cli/tests/test_cli_workflow.py passed when run independently with bytecode disabled.

monolithic_unittest_discover.note: The monolithic discover invocation remains noisy/long in this execution environment and was not used as the release gate. Class-split regression is the recorded acceptance method for M60.4.2.

changes_made: Updated changelog/current version notes to mark M60.4.2 as stabilization after M60.4.1.
Removed generated cache artifacts and generated package reports created during validation runs before packaging.
next_recommended_step: M60.5 PathWalk Benchmark Readiness: matrix smoke, sample SUMMARY.json, and benchmark instructions for external model runs.
